global_production_variables.directorial_treatment: Warm, gentle children's picture-book adaptation: soft practical lighting, playful dog-level eyelines, cozy domestic color palette, clear readable actions that match the rhyme line-for-line. Keep Buster's black-and-white markings locked; never recolor. Prefer continuous blocking over flashy cuts; dream sequence may soften edges and cool the palette without losing character identity.

Character_Buster.description: Buster the Noodle Head Dog: small black-and-white dog, playful and bouncy like a frog, not very bright, expressive face, wears black-and-white pajamas later; beloved family pet.
Character_Buster.voice_profile: Small dog energy: light playful yips, soft whines, and happy pants rather than human speech; bright, quick, slightly goofy cadence; same voice every scene.

Character_Mom.description: Momma/Mom: kind adult caregiver in a cozy home, patient bedtime parent who guides Buster outside, gives treats and water, and pets him while he sleeps.
Character_Mom.voice_profile: Adult woman, warm medium pitch, calm gentle pace, soft maternal accent-neutral English, reassuring energy; same voice every scene.

Character_Daddy.description: Daddy: adult partner in Mom and Daddy's bedroom; mostly present as a sleeping/settled figure in the shared bed during Buster's bedtime climb-in.
Character_Daddy.voice_profile: Adult man, low-medium pitch, quiet sleepy energy if any sound; minimal dialogue; same voice every scene.

Character_Narrator.description: Off-screen storyteller who delivers the book's rhyming narration; never appears on camera.
Character_Narrator.voice_profile: Warm adult male storyteller, medium-low pitch, same voice every scene.

Loc_Living_Room.description: Cozy family living room / entry area of a modest house at evening, soft lamps, dog-friendly clutter free of hazards.
Loc_Living_Room.visual_lock: Warm lamp light, soft sofa or armchair, visible water bowl area nearby, front door to yard, cream/beige walls, wooden floor accents. No modern neon tech clutter. Treat jar or treat plate can appear near Mom's chair.

Loc_Backyard.description: Small evening backyard with bushes and grass where a dog can potty.
Loc_Backyard.visual_lock: Dusk/evening outdoor light, green bushes along a fence line, grass patch, house exterior wall and door visible for in/out continuity. No busy street traffic.

Loc_Stairs_Hall.description: Indoor staircase leading up to the parents' bedroom hallway.
Loc_Stairs_Hall.visual_lock: Carpeted or wood stairs with simple banister, soft night lighting from upstairs hall, family-home photos optional but no readable personal names. Same wall color family as living room.

Loc_Parents_Bedroom.description: Parents' bedroom with a large bed, nightstands, soft bedding — Buster's preferred sleep spot.
Loc_Parents_Bedroom.visual_lock: Large bed with soft white/cream bedding and pillows, two nightstands, warm bedside lamps, calm wall color. Room labeled only as home bedroom; no name plaques. Window optional with night exterior.

Loc_Dreamscape.description: Soft dream space mixing fluffy snow fields and a sunny yard for bunny-chasing.
Loc_Dreamscape.visual_lock: Slightly soft-focus dream look, fluffy white snow drifts, then open yard grass with cartoon-friendly bunnies; Buster remains the same black-and-white dog. No horror or dark nightmare tones.

music_bed.style_description: Light playful children's underscore with soft piano and pizzicato strings
